name: ashes-and-oath
description: Ashes & Oath — server-authoritative fantasy strategy for two players

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,client --prefix-colors magenta,cyan "npm run dev:server:raw" "npm run dev:client:raw"
scripts.dev:client: npm run build -w @ashes/shared --if-present && npm run dev:client:raw
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @ashes/shared --if-present && npm run dev:server:raw
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ashes/shared --if-present && npm run build -w @ashes/server && npm run build -w @ashes/client
